notes: mainContainerPaddingXMobilePx not separately measured; mobile pass used for h1FontSizeMobilePx only.

Desktop capture title was 'Loading...' at domcontentloaded. Page body did render (screenshot verified: event title, venue, ticket prices visible). h1 measured at desktop may reflect a loading state element (fontSizePx 18px matches body text size, suggesting the main h1 was not yet injected by React when getComputedStyle ran). Mobile pass captured correctly with full page title.

eventCardImageAspectRatio 1.78 and format JPG confirmed from og:image CDN URL: s1.ticketm.net/.../EVENT_DETAIL_PAGE_16_9.jpg. Dimensions from Playwright bounding rect at 143x80 (scaled thumbnail in the page).
heroImageAspectRatio: same image as card thumbnail in this layout (event detail uses a single 16:9 hero image, not a separate hero component).
Playwright captured both viewports successfully. Screenshots verified as real Ticketmaster AU event detail pages.
pageBackground: rgba(0,0,0,0) indicates transparent body background; visual background is white (#ffffff) from a parent element. Header/nav is black (#121212).
small/caption element: no <small> or [class*=caption] found in the DOM at measurement time.
h2 and h3: null - the event detail page layout uses a single h1 for event name and does not use h2/h3 headings in the measurable DOM.
Primary button (Find Tickets): background-color #00783a (green), colour #ffffff. transition-duration 0s indicates no CSS transition on the button at rest state.
